description_long: This object is a set of six metal hand tools, including multiple pairs of scissors and forceps, arranged in a row. Each tool features distinct handles, with some having circular finger loops and others with straight or angled grips. The blades vary in length and curvature, with some being straight and others angled or curved, suitable for precision cutting or gripping tasks. The tools are uniformly colored in a dark metallic gray, suggesting stainless steel construction, and have a smooth, hard surface finish. The finger loops are round and appear to be of different sizes, accommodating various finger placements. No visible brand markings or logos are present on any of the tools.
description: A set of six metallic hand tools, including scissors and forceps, with smooth, dark gray surfaces and various blade and handle designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six tools side by side, clearly displaying the different handle and blade shapes.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profiles of the tools, with minimal detail visible except for the overall slenderness.
description_view_2: Rear view of the tools, mirroring the front but with the handles and blades reversed in orientation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edges of the tools with little detail except for their linear arrangement.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, circular metal handles; not padded or coated; ambidextrous design for general use.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible rivet or screw pivot joints; not adjustable; standard fixed design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Round finger loops of varying sizes; smooth metal with no inserts or texturing; accommodates one or two fingers per loop.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Mixed blade tips: some pointed for precision, others blunt or rounded for safety and gripping.
